flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lewis and Clark Community College fell 29% between 2006 and 2009 (22.1% → 15.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lewis and Clark Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lewis and Clark Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lewis and Clark Community College fell 38% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.6k → $7.8k).
